page: Microsoft Azure DC16as_cc_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DCACCV5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The configuration includes 16 vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with 2 threads per core. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor features 32 KB of L1d cache, 0.5 MB of L2 cache, and 32 MB of L3 cache, alongside hardware support for AVX, AES, VAES, SHA_NI, and SVM virtualization.

This server type does not include any bundled local storage, though it is designated as Premium Storage capable for external disk attachments. It does not feature any GPUs, and it comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the DC16as_cc_v5 demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng testing and strong text generation speeds for small LLM models (135M parameters) at 268.58 tokens per second. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth (such as 39.55 GB/sec read and 25.87 GB/sec write for large uncached blocks), and database operations fall within the average tier. Given its balanced resource distribution and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is suitable for general-purpose workloads, web serving, and database operations utilizing external premium storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_cc_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 16 vCPUs, 8 physical cores, and 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance lacks bundled local storage but is Premium Storage capable, and it contains no GPUs. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities and strong text generation speeds for small LLM models, while multi-core execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform in the average tier. This hardware profile is suited for general-purpose computing, web serving, and database workloads relying on external storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_cc_v5 is a general-purpose VM featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and no local storage. It offers strong single-core performance for general enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_cc_v5 is a general-purpose VM with 16 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and strong single-core CPU performance.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and secure virtualization for enterprise workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
